title: sciodaphyllum octostylum
intro: Sciodaphyllum octostylum, also known as the Philippine umbrella tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating coughs and respiratory issues, and even aiding in the management of diabetes. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Sciodaphyllum octostylum can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
